item.title: Business Analytics with Excel
item.description: Online course on Simplilearn completed on 25th April 2020.

item.title: Data Analytics Consulting Virtual Internship
item.description:
An virtual intership program from KPMG via Forage

Major responsibilities were to analyse client data and provide the following:

  • Data Insights
  • Data Insights and Presentation
  • Data Quality Assessment

item.title: Python for Everybody
item.description:
Capstone:

  • Retrieving, Processing, and Visualizing Data with Python
  • Using Python to Access Web Data
  • Programming for Everybody (Getting Started with Python)
  • Using Databases with Python
  • Python Data Structures

Completed the specization course on Coursera by University of Michigan.

item.title: SQL for Data Science
item.description: Online course on Coursera by UC Davis completed on 02nd December 2019.

item.title: Statistics with SAS
item.description: Online course on Coursera by SAS completed on 31st August 2019.

item.title: Summary Statistics in Public Health
item.description: Online course on Coursera by Johns Hopkins University completed on 24th August 2019.
